DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF THE PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED WITHOUT OPPOSITION. THE DEPOSITION SHALL BE HELD ON OR BEFORE OCTOBER 30, 2015. THE COURT NOTES PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL ON OCTOBER 15, 2015, IN DEPT. 302, HAS SCHEDULED A MOTION FOR PERMISSION TO WITHDRAW AS COUNSEL BASED ON INABILITY LOCATE HIS CLIENT FOR THE PAST YEAR. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SHALL MAKE ALL APPROPRIATE ATTEMPTS TO NOTIFY TO PLAINTIFF AS TO THE ISSUANCE OF THIS ORDER. IF UNSUCCESSFUL COUNSEL SHALL SUBMIT A FURTHER DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF HIS WITHDRAWAL MOTION REFLECTING THE EFFORTS TO LOCATE HIS CLIENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED.

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-03-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2016 Continued To May-03-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Tim Fama, Esq. appearing for Defendant. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to May-03-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK RWoods.; Proceedings not reported. (610) *** NOTE: If Self-represented Plaintiff fails to appear at the next Order to Show Cause hearing, the Court intends to dismiss this case. ***

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2015 Continued To Feb-23-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. MARRIANNE B. SIOSON, ESQ. of Law Offices of Brian L. Larsen, Tel No. 415-398-5000 appearing for the moving party;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. BRIAN L. LARSEN'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR ABDUR SALIH is granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition And Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Sep-15-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. TIM FAMA, OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 1-415-554-3921 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant City And County Of San Francisco's Motion to Compel the deposition of the plaintiff is granted without opposition. The deposition shall be held on or before October 30, 2015. The Court notes plaintiff's counsel on October 15, 2015, in Dept. 302, has scheduled a motion for permission to withdraw as counsel based on inability locate his client for the past year. Plaintiff's counsel shall make all appropriate attempts to notify to plaintiff as to the issuance of this Order. If unsuccessful counsel shall submit a further declaration in support of his withdrawal motion reflecting the efforts to locate his client. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition And Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Aug-21-2015 Continued To Sep-15-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Deposition is continued to September 15, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 302 on the court's own motion. Judge Pro Tem: Dennis Hyde, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2015 Continued To Oct-27-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
